things.name: Freiburg Minster
things.description: Magnificent Gothic cathedral of the 13th-16th centuries with an ornately carved portal and the finest medieval spire in Germany

things.name: Münsterplatz Market
things.description: Daily farmers market around the cathedral offering Black Forest produce, local cheeses, sausages and artisan goods

things.name: Schlossberg
things.description: Forested hill rising steeply above the old town with a hilltop restaurant and sweeping views over Freiburg and the Black Forest

things.name: Augustinermuseum
things.description: Outstanding collection of Upper Rhine medieval art in a beautifully converted Augustinian monastery in the heart of the old town

things.name: Bächle
things.description: Freiburg's unique network of medieval water channels running through the city streets, fed by the Dreisam river year-round

things.name: Historisches Kaufhaus
things.description: Striking Gothic mercantile hall of 1520 with crimson facade and imperial Habsburg crests overlooking the Münsterplatz

things.name: Black Forest (Schwarzwald)
things.description: Germany's most beloved natural landscape of dense fir forests, cuckoo clocks, hot springs and fairy-tale villages, on Freiburg's doorstep

things.name: Stadtgarten Freiburg
things.description: Victorian public park with a rose garden, ponds and sculptures providing a green oasis in the heart of the city

things.name: SC Freiburg Stadion
things.description: State-of-the-art Europa-Park Stadion opened 2021, home of SC Freiburg and one of the greenest football venues in Europe

things.name: Natural History Museum Freiburg
things.description: Engaging natural history collections spanning geology, palaeontology and zoology with strong Black Forest regional exhibits
